caption: A person's hands are shown opening a white box on a patterned tabletop featuring green palm trees. In the top-left frame, a hand begins to lift a yellow lid from the box. By the top-right frame, the lid is lifted higher, and the hand moves to the side. The bottom-left frame shows the lid being removed completely, revealing a trading card inside. In the bottom-right frame, the person holds up the trading card, which features a baseball player and the text "WADE BOGGS". The background includes a small electronic scale and a screen showing a man in a black shirt. Throughout the sequence, the logos "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible on the tabletop and on-screen. The person's hands are the primary focus, interacting with the packaging to reveal the collectible card.
